name: Chunky Date, Coconut and Almond Granola
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Pitted dates (cut crosswise into thirds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix the oats, almonds, coconut, cashews, brown sugar, allspice, and cinnamon.
3. Melt the butter and honey in a heavy small saucepan over low heat. Pour the mixture over the granola ingredients and toss well to combine.
4. Spread the mixture evenly on a cookie sheet.
5. Bake for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Add the dates and mix gently to distribute any clumps.
7. Continue baking until the granola is golden brown, stirring frequently for about 15 more minutes.
8. Allow to cool completely before serving. (This recipe can be made up to 2 weeks in advance and stored airtight at room temperature.)
Makes approximately 6 cups.
